channel.title: India | The Indian Express
channel.description: Latest News Today: Breaking News and Top Headlines from India, Entertainment, Business, Politics and Sports

media:content.media:title: A son lost to Iran-Israel conflict, a body not found — and a father in Mumbai who refuses to mourn
Vessel MKD Vyom was hit by a missile on March 1 which left a hole (see above image) of about one metre above waterline on the ship’s side. (Express Photo)
Charred insides of the vessel MKD Vyom close to where the missile hit and caused an explosion. (Express Photo)

item.title: Fishing boats docked, livelihoods at sea: War ripples in Mumbai, Goa
